summary: Tested all 3 P0 fixes for Bloom app: (1) service-types seeding/categories, (2) password reset flow, (3) chat→profile navigation. All P0 features verified working. Fixed one critical bug found during testing: GET /api/services returning 500 due to ServiceResponse.custom_avatar type mismatch.

bug_fixed_by_t1.issue: GET /api/services returned 500 for all requests. ServiceResponse.custom_avatar was typed as str='', but older DB records stored null. Pydantic v2 raises ValidationError when None is passed for str field.
bug_fixed_by_t1.fix: Changed ServiceResponse.custom_avatar: str = '' → Optional[str] = '' (line 105). Now handles both null and empty string from legacy DB records.
bug_fixed_by_t1.severity: CRITICAL - SupportPage could not load any existing services, breaking the entire Vzájemná podpora feature

service_types_endpoint.details: GET /api/service-types returns exactly 7 categories: beauty, health, skills, transport, tech, creative, other. All have correct Czech names. No test entries found.

support_page_categories.details: SupportPage type-filter dropdown shows 8 options (7 service types + 'Všechny typy'). All 7 expected categories present: Krása a péče, Zdraví a wellness, Dovednosti a kurzy, Doprava a stěhování, Technika a IT, Kreativní služby, Ostatní.

create_service_flow.details: Full flow tested: opened dialog, filled offer/need/description, selected 'Zdraví a wellness' category, submitted. Toast 'Nabídka vytvořena!' shown. Dialog closed. Service appeared in list.

create_service_kategorie_no_duplicates.details: Category select in create dialog shows 7 options from DB only (no duplicate 'Ostatní' - fix from iteration_6 still working).

reset_password_page_no_502.details: /reset-password?token=TEST loads without 502. Shows form with new-password-input, confirm-password-input, reset-submit-btn. Invalid token shows correct error toast 'Neplatný nebo expirovaný odkaz pro obnovení hesla.'

reset_password_e2e.details: Inserted valid token into MongoDB password_resets collection. Navigated to /reset-password?token=PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TOKEN_xxx. Filled new password. Submitted. 'Heslo obnoveno!' success state shown with 'Přejít na přihlášení' button. Backend verified: old password no longer works, new password works.

chat_profile_link.details: data-testid='chat-profile-link' found in chat header after selecting a conversation. Clicking navigates to /users/:userId (e.g. /users/28977bd6-130a-4c82-95ec-a30ff30a66a4). User profile page loads correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED by T1: ServiceResponse.custom_avatar was str='' but DB stores null for users who haven't uploaded an avatar. Caused GET /api/services 500 error. Fixed to Optional[str]=''.
NOTE: Some old DB service records have service_type='' (empty) or service_type=UUID (from before seeding). These are legacy data but display correctly with empty category badge.
Resend email on free tier only delivers to verified emails - password reset email sending returns 503 for unverified recipients (correct behavior, token still saved in DB for admin manual use)
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test service 'Playwright test vaření' (not cleaned up - can be deleted via admin or user UI). Inserted and consumed password reset token during e2e test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P0 fixes verified working. Fixed additional bug: ServiceResponse.custom_avatar Optional type. SupportPage now loads correctly with 7 service categories. Password reset e2e works (token in DB, page renders, success state shown). Chat profile link works with data-testid='chat-profile-link'. Admin credentials: test1@bloom.cz / test123.

get_services_500.root_cause: ServiceResponse Pydantic model had custom_avatar: str = '' (non-optional) but MongoDB stored null for users who hadn't uploaded a custom avatar. When POST /api/services was called, it stored user.get('custom_avatar', '') which returned None if the user field was null. On GET /api/services, ServiceResponse(**s) raised ValidationError: Input should be a valid string [type=string_type, input_value=None].
get_services_500.reproduction: Call GET /api/services - returns 500. Check backend logs for pydantic ValidationError on custom_avatar field.
get_services_500.mitigation: Changed ServiceResponse.custom_avatar type from str to Optional[str] at line 105 of server.py. Default value kept as '' (empty string) for new records.
